'''pashaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:drabble|drabble]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-sh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:drabble|drabble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pashaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæshæyæth|pæshæyæth]] || [[word:pæshæyæj|pæshæyæj]] || [[word:pæshæyæsh|pæshæyæsh]] || [[word:pæshæyæ|pæshæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pashashayath|pashashayath]] || [[word:pashashayaj|pashashayaj]] || [[word:pashashayash|pashashayash]] || [[word:pashashaya|pashashaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pashayath|pashayath]] || [[word:pashayaj|pashayaj]] || [[word:pashayash|pashayash]] || [[word:pashaya|pashaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pashafyath|pashafyath]] || [[word:pashafyaj|pashafyaj]] || [[word:pashafyash|pashafyash]] || [[word:pashafyaf|pashafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pashayatha|pashayatha]] || [[word:pashayaja|pashayaja]] || [[word:pashayasha|pashayasha]] || [[word:pashayaka|pashayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pashayath|pashayath]] || [[word:pashayaj|pashayaj]] || [[word:pashayash|pashayash]] || [[word:pashaya|pashaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pashayathal|pashayathal]] || [[word:pashayajal|pashayajal]] || [[word:pashayashal|pashayashal]] || [[word:pashayakal|pashayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pashayathatha|pashayathatha]] || [[word:pashayajaja|pashayajaja]] || [[word:pashayashasha|pashayashasha]] || [[word:pashayaka|pashayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pashayathan|pashayathan]] || [[word:pashayajan|pashayajan]] || [[word:pashayashan|pashayashan]] || [[word:pashayakan|pashayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pashayathaoro|pashayathaoro]] || [[word:pashayajaoro|pashayajaoro]] || [[word:pashayashaoro|pashayashaoro]] || [[word:pashayakaoro|pashayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
